// <auto-generated />
#nullable enable

namespace TestNs
{
    partial class MyControl
    {
        /// <summary>
        /// Defines the <see cref="IsPressed"/> property.
        /// </summary>
        public static readonly global::Avalonia.StyledProperty<bool> IsPressedProperty =
            global::Avalonia.AvaloniaProperty.Register<global::TestNs.MyControl, bool>(nameof(IsPressed));

        public partial bool IsPressed
        {
            get => GetValue(IsPressedProperty);
            private set => SetValue(IsPressedProperty, value);
        }
    }
}
